allow: PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess; "PID $\($p.Id\) $\($p.ProcessName\) started $\($p.StartTime\)" } else { "nothing listening on 8000" })

PowerShell($pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 8080,8081,8082,8083 } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { try { $proc = Get-Process -Id $p -ErrorAction Stop; "Port owner PID $p = $\($proc.ProcessName\)" } catch {} })

PowerShell($pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 8080,8081,8082,8083 } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $p" } catch { "could not kill $p" } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $still = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 8080,8081,8082,8083 }; if \($still\) { "STILL IN USE: " + \($still.LocalPort -join ','\) } else { "8080-8083 all free" })

PowerShell($codes = @\(\); foreach \($p in @\("portfolio/twr","cashflow/readiness"\)\) { try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8 -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; $codes += "$p=200" } catch { $codes += "$p=$\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" } }; $codes -join "  ")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { "listening PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } else { "NOTHING on 8000" }; try { $o = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; if \($o.Content -match "/portfolio/twr"\) { "route /portfolio/twr REGISTERED" } else { "route NOT in openapi" } } catch { "openapi fetch failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(foreach \($p in 33072,18192,38176,6600\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed $p" } catch { "skip $p \($\($_.Exception.Message\)\)" } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; $l = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($l\) { "STILL LISTENING: $\($l.OwningProcess\)" } else { "port 8000 free" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $l = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($l\) { foreach \($p in \($l.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique\)\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "killed leftover $p" } catch {} } } ; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $l2 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($l2\) { "STILL LISTENING" } else { "port 8000 free" })
Bash(.venv-mac/bin/python -m pytest app/domains/portfolio app/domains/mutual_funds app/domains/rebalancing app/domains/asset_allocation -q)

Bash(.venv-mac/bin/python -m pytest app/domains/portfolio app/domains/mutual_funds app/domains/rebalancing app/domains/asset_allocation -q --ignore=app/domains/portfolio/services/tests/test_benchmark_windowed_xirr.py)
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('declared dep:', p.dependencies['posthog-js'] || p.devDependencies?.['posthog-js'] || 'NOT DECLARED'\)")
